content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -1.19%, Bank Nifty -1.50%, India VIX +12% to 18.88 — clear risk-off open with PSU banks and Realty leading declines. However, FMCG (Marico, Dabur, HUL) and select pharma/IT are bid as defensive rotation. Book is 65% deployed across 15 names; priority is position management — trail SLs on winners with intact theses, respect SLs on losers, no chasing into the volatility spike.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23800,
      "nifty_resistance": 24100
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1058.00,
      "new_target": 1135.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+9.6% winner. Trail SL from 1075 to 1058 (2.4% below CMP 1084.70 — preserves 1% trail-gap floor). Q4 PAT +19%, EPS beat 13.89%, AAA upgrade pursuit, near 52w high. Thesis intact; lock in ~7.5% gain as floor."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.2%. Defensive hedge in a VIX-spike tape. SL 121 (~2.2% below CMP) is appropriate; do not tighten further as gold can chop here. JPM forecast $5000/oz longer-term remains the thesis."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 824.00,
      "new_target": 855.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+2.2%, FMCG bid hard in defensive rotation (HUL +4.7%, NEST +2.2%). Current SL 825 is ABOVE CMP 833.30 — verified: 825 < 833.30, SL is below CMP by ~1.1%, OK. Hold SL at 824 (sub-1% adjustment — keep as-is actually). Correction: keep SL at 825, no-op MODIFY not justified. Switching to HOLD reasoning."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1356.71,
      "new_target": 1420.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+9.1% winner, surged 7.4% today on Q4 print + Cigniti merger. Current SL 1356.71 (1.7% below CMP 1380) — preserves trail-gap floor. No-op detected; keeping HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-2.7%, near SL 3000 with CMP 2997. SL is 0.1% above CMP — already effectively triggered intraday; let the SL fire if it breaks. Do NOT preempt (Rule 17). Thesis (Rs 33,000 Cr corvette L1, P-17B RFP) intact; HAL results May 13 is a sector cluster catalyst not company-specific. Respect the calibrated SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.9%. SL 820 is below CMP 827.45 (verified 820 < 827.45, gap 0.9% — already snug). Q4 record revenue/PAT, three investor meets May 15/26/27. Thesis intact. Holding SL — micro-adjust would be wasted signal."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-2.7%, near SL 1465 with CMP 1445.90. SL is ABOVE CMP — already at trigger level. Q4 PAT +36.6%, UVG 15.3% — thesis intact. Respect SL; do not preempt. If it breaks 1465, fire."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.1%. SL 1580 (2.8% below CMP 1624.90). Q4 turned profitable, Zaynich USFDA mid-2026 catalyst. Multiple SMP designations on results day a minor governance signal but not disqualifying. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.1%. SL 2755 (0.9% below CMP 2779.10). Q4 PAT +10.6%, FY26 +47%, 8% single-day surge post-results. Thesis intact, SL appropriately placed."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.2%. SL 9020 (0.8% below CMP 9091). Q4 record revenue +27%, 52w high, multiple broker upgrades to Rs 9700-10500. Thesis strong."
    },
    {
      "action": "EXIT",
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 25,
      "order_type": "MARKET",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "POST-ENTRY new information: Q4 PAT -17.4% YoY, EPS missed by 18%, UBS downgraded to SELL, Citi SELL Rs 1060, Nuvama flags -17%, consensus Rs 1751 vs CMP 1989 = -12% downside. Multiple brokerage SELL cluster is a fact that materialized AFTER entry. 32% US export exposure during soft US auto cycle. Bearish research modifier -0.12. Thesis (defence forging on India-Pak tensions) is overwhelmed by core Q4 miss + brokerage capitulation. Exit at -1.2% beats waiting for SL 1955."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-3.2%, near SL 354 with CMP 356.80 (verified 354 < 356.80, SL 0.8% below CMP). Q4 PAT +30.6%, Macquarie target 415. Financial Services sector under pressure today but thesis intact. Let SL do its job at 354."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.8%. SL 10440 (1.5% below CMP 10598). Q4 PAT +103%, Rs 5,633 Cr buyback at Rs 12,000/share (floor support!), dividend Rs 150 record date May 29. Best research modifier in book (+0.13). Auto sector weak today (-1.62%) but Bajaj has buyback floor."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.9% but +2.48% today as FMCG rotation kicks in. SL 472 (2% below CMP 481.65). Q4 PAT +16%, FY27 guidance upgraded to low double-digit, dividend Rs 5.50. Thesis intact and confirming via sector tape today."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1226.00,
      "new_target": 1290.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.6%, fresh 52w high today. SL already at breakeven 1226. CMP 1246.60 — SL is 1.7% below CMP, within trail-gap floor. No change needed; HOLD instead."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1058.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail SL up 17 pts to 1058 to lock in ~7.5% gain while preserving 2.4% trail gap below CMP 1084.70."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge, SL appropriately placed."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 825 already snug 1% below CMP 833.30 — further tightening would risk self-stopout on FMCG chop. Thesis confirming today."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1356.71 is 1.7% below CMP 1380, appropriate trail gap. +9.1% winner, let it run toward 1420 target."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Respect SL at 3000. No new post-entry negative info."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already snug, no-op would be wasted signal."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "At SL — respect it. Thesis strong (Q4 PAT +36.6%); if 1465 breaks, fire."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Marginal +0.1%, no trail trigger yet (need +2%)."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Flat, SL well-placed."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Flat, SL appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "current_action": "EXIT",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Multi-brokerage SELL downgrade cluster + Q4 PAT miss = new post-entry info invalidates thesis. Exit at -1.2% beats waiting for SL."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Near SL — respect it. Q4 fundamentals strong, sector pressure transient."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Buyback at Rs 12,000 provides hard floor. Hold through volatility."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "FMCG rotation confirming thesis today; +2.48%. SL well-placed."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already at breakeven; need +2% more to justify next trail step."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "No new admits despite watchlist surfacing BULLISH candidates (THERMAX +14.6% gap, NUVAMA +10.3% gap, TATACONSUM +6.96%, LALPATHLAB +6.68%). Explicit per-name reject rationale per Rule 18: (1) THERMAX/NUVAMA — gap-up momentum on Q4 prints, chasing into VIX +12% spike is poor risk-reward; would need pullback to assess. (2) BERGEPAINT — Q4 results board meeting TOMORROW (May 12) = binary event within 3 sessions, Rule 11 disqualifies new entry; research modifier -0.10 bearish. (3) TATACONSUM/LALPATHLAB — no deep data provided in this batch, would need re-pull. (4) Book is already 65% deployed with 15 names; adding into a sharp VIX spike with NIFTY -1.19% would be poor timing — risk-off tape favors letting existing book breathe, not adding leverage. HFCL pending MIS BUY at 133.50 has been OPEN 125+ hours — that is a stale order; not addressing in this cycle but flagging for review.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Deployment 65%, cash 35% — within soft 80% target and providing dry powder for a clearer setup. Today's P&L +0.64%, cumulative +0.45%. Performance context (5d win rate 12%, profit factor 0.5x) demands DISCIPLINE not activity — Rule 17 (respect SLs) and Rule 18 (don't freeze admit book) must coexist. Today's tape (VIX spike, broad selloff) is exactly the kind of session where forced admits would compound losses. Key actions this tick: (a) EXIT BHARATFORG on new bearish broker cluster, (b) TRAIL_SL on PNBHOUSING to lock in winner, (c) HOLD all others — respect SLs at trigger zones (GRSE, PIDILITIND, ABCAPITAL) rather than preempt."
}
